coverage_driver_notes: Local environment loads xdebug 3.4.5; CI canonical lane (.github/workflows/tests.yml) currently uses pcov on PHP 8.4 for codecov upload. The dedicated SEP-51 coverage workflow (.github/workflows/sep-51-coverage.yml) requires xdebug to satisfy subgate (a) branch-coverage requirements. Re-baseline this field on the CI lane during the first CI run.
generator_output_sha_method: sha256 of (cd Soneso/StellarSDK/Xdr && tar cf - $(find . -type f -name '*.php' | sort))
